npm_test.note: Leader rerun after one unexplained nonzero attempt produced a full log with 53/53 passing.

review_checkpoint_evidence: US3 is cleared on Windows/Node local evidence. Real CLI-path coverage exists through test/helpers/cli-fixture.js spawning node src/cli.js, and test/clean-safety.test.js verifies default dry-run, --safe, --all confirmation_required, --all --yes, missing-target skip, and root/out-of-root/absolute refusal envelopes. The clean command plans before deletion, returns refused-target failures with dryRun/mode/targets/removed, and never deletes approved targets after a refused plan. Manual reviewer smoke also confirmed Windows junction refusal leaves both the junction and outside directory intact.

scope_drift.decision_basis: Reviewed clean behavior against MP-011/MP-012 and CA-001/CA-015/CA-016. The implemented surface remains CLI-only clean preview/safe/all-confirmed/refusal behavior, with no reset, database reset, Docker reset, GUI/TUI, MCP, agent, daemon, remote, or marketplace scope expansion.

residual_risks: Evidence is Windows/Node local only and does not support macOS/Linux or cross-platform-ready claims.
Symlink/junction containment has manual Windows smoke evidence but is not yet an automated regression test.
recovery_hints: If symlink/junction behavior becomes a recurring risk, add a platform-aware automated clean-safety regression.
